name: SMS Pharmaceuticals Limited
summary: SMS Pharmaceuticals Limited manufactures and sells active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and intermediates in India. The company offers anti-ulcer, anti-fungal, anti-migraine, anti-diabetic, erectile dysfunction, antiemetic, antiepileptic, antipsychotic, anti-hypertensive, anti-anginal, anti-viral, urinary antispasmodic, and anti-retroviral APIs. It is also involved in the contract research activities. In addition, the company exports its products. SMS Pharmaceuticals Limited was incorporated in 1987 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
